_comment: Generated by build-atlas-v3-native.mjs. Maps each emitted slide to the Atlas archetype its fixture claims.

fixtures.title: Every slide here was gated by the rule it describes
Six artifact kinds are visible to a shallow reader, ten to a deep one
Zero native chart parts became ten
The gate decides every slide, or says it could not
The model's authority ends at the plan
Portability is recorded per artifact kind, and measured twice
The equation is a real object, and it took a wrapper to make it travel
Eighty-two of eighty-four candidates cleared every gate
Maturity is derived from receipts, never written beside them
One gate is open, and no amount of compute can close it
